scripts.build: command -v anchor >/dev/null 2>&1 && anchor build || echo 'anchor CLI not installed — skipping (Sprint 5 introduces real programs)'
scripts.test: command -v anchor >/dev/null 2>&1 && anchor test || echo 'anchor CLI not installed — no tests yet (Sprint 5)'
scripts.lint: echo 'Rust formatting via cargo fmt' && exit 0
scripts.typecheck: echo 'No TS in this workspace' && exit 0
